overview: A responsive multi-conversion calculator supporting currency exchange, length, temperature, weight, and volume conversions. Optimized for mobile use on iOS and Android as a progressive web app.
features: Currency converter with major currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, CAD, INR, CNY)
Length converter (inches, cm, feet, meters, miles, km)
Weight converter (lbs, kg, grams, ounces, stones)
Volume converter (liters, gallons, ml, fl oz, cups, pints)
Swap units button for quick reversal
